Module com.github.oshi

module com.github.oshi
JNA-based native implementation of the OSHI API for JDK 8+.

This module uses JNA for native access and supports all OSHI platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, DragonFly BSD, FreeBSD, NetBSD, OpenBSD, Solaris, AIX).

Usage: 

SystemInfoProvider si = SystemInfoFactory.create();
HardwareAbstractionLayer hal = si.getHardware();
OperatingSystem os = si.getOperatingSystem();
Re-using the same SystemInfo instance optimizes caching and CPU performance; creating a new instance minimizes memory usage.
See Also:
  • SystemInfo

  • Packages

    Exports
    Package
    Description
    oshi
    [oshi-core API] Provides a cross-platform implementation to retrieve Operating System and Hardware Information, such as OS version, memory, CPU, disk, devices, sensors, etc.
    oshi.util.gpu
    Utility classes for optional vendor GPU library integration (NVML, ADL).
    oshi.util.platform.mac
    Provides utilities for macOS.
    oshi.util.platform.unix.dragonflybsd
    Provides utilities for DragonFly BSD
    oshi.util.platform.unix.freebsd
    Provides utilities for FreeBSD
    oshi.util.platform.unix.netbsd
    Provides utilities for NetBSD
    oshi.util.platform.unix.openbsd
    Provides utilities for OpenBSD
    oshi.util.platform.unix.solaris
    Provides utilities for Solaris
    oshi.util.platform.windows
    Provides utilities for Windows.
    Indirect Exports
    From
    Packages
    com.github.oshi.common

    Description
    transitive
    com.github.oshi.common
    Common OSHI API interfaces, abstract base classes, annotations, and utilities shared by all OSHI implementations.
